---
title: "Projets"
pagetitle: "Projects"
description: "Une sélection de projets data, finance et économie sur lesquels j'ai travaillé."
listing:
  - id: projects
    contents: "**/*/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: "220px"
    fields: [image, title, description, categories]
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: unnumbered
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    page-size: 30
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
toc: false
body-classes: page-projects
---

::: {.projects-intro}
:::

::: {#projects}
:::
